item.title: Example Page 1
item.description:
In this tutorial, I’ll share my top 10 tips for getting started with Academic:

Tip 1

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Duis posuere tellus ac convallis placerat. Proin tincidunt magna sed ex sollicitudin condimentum. Sed ac faucibus dolor, scelerisque sollicitudin nisi. Cras purus urna, suscipit quis sapien eu, pulvinar tempor diam. Quisque risus orci, mollis id ante sit amet, gravida egestas nisl. Sed ac tempus magna. Proin in dui enim. Donec condimentum, sem id dapibus fringilla, tellus enim condimentum arcu, nec volutpat est felis vel metus. Vestibulum sit amet erat at nulla eleifend gravida.

Nullam vel molestie justo. Curabitur vitae efficitur leo. In hac habitasse platea dictumst. Sed pulvinar mauris dui, eget varius purus congue ac. Nulla euismod, lorem vel elementum dapibus, nunc justo porta mi, sed tempus est est vel tellus. Nam et enim eleifend, laoreet sem sit amet, elementum sem. Morbi ut leo congue, maximus velit ut, finibus arcu. In et libero cursus, rutrum risus non, molestie leo. Nullam congue quam et volutpat malesuada. Sed risus tortor, pulvinar et dictum nec, sodales non mi. Phasellus lacinia commodo laoreet. Nam mollis, erat in feugiat consectetur, purus eros egestas tellus, in auctor urna odio at nibh. Mauris imperdiet nisi ac magna convallis, at rhoncus ligula cursus.

Cras aliquam rhoncus ipsum, in hendrerit nunc mattis vitae. Duis vitae efficitur metus, ac tempus leo. Cras nec fringilla lacus. Quisque sit amet risus at ipsum pharetra commodo. Sed aliquam mauris at consequat eleifend. Praesent porta, augue sed viverra bibendum, neque ante euismod ante, in vehicula justo lorem ac eros. Suspendisse augue libero, venenatis eget tincidunt ut, malesuada at lorem. Donec vitae bibendum arcu. Aenean maximus nulla non pretium iaculis. Quisque imperdiet, nulla in pulvinar aliquet, velit quam ultrices quam, sit amet fringilla leo sem vel nunc. Mauris in lacinia lacus.

Suspendisse a tincidunt lacus. Curabitur at urna sagittis, dictum ante sit amet, euismod magna. Sed rutrum massa id tortor commodo, vitae elementum turpis tempus. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Aenean purus turpis, venenatis a ullamcorper nec, tincidunt et massa. Integer posuere quam rutrum arcu vehicula imperdiet. Mauris ullamcorper quam vitae purus congue, quis euismod magna eleifend. Vestibulum semper vel augue eget tincidunt. Fusce eget justo sodales, dapibus odio eu, ultrices lorem. Duis condimentum lorem id eros commodo, in facilisis mauris scelerisque. Morbi sed auctor leo. Nullam volutpat a lacus quis pharetra. Nulla congue rutrum magna a ornare.

Aliquam in turpis accumsan, malesuada nibh ut, hendrerit justo. Cum sociis natoque penatibus et magnis dis parturient montes, nascetur ridiculus mus. Quisque sed erat nec justo posuere suscipit. Donec ut efficitur arcu, in malesuada neque. Nunc dignissim nisl massa, id vulputate nunc pretium nec. Quisque eget urna in risus suscipit ultricies. Pellentesque odio odio, tincidunt in eleifend sed, posuere a diam. Nam gravida nisl convallis semper elementum. Morbi vitae felis faucibus, vulputate orci placerat, aliquet nisi. Aliquam erat volutpat. Maecenas sagittis pulvinar purus, sed porta quam laoreet at.

Tip 2

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Duis posuere tellus ac convallis placerat. Proin tincidunt magna sed ex sollicitudin condimentum. Sed ac faucibus dolor, scelerisque sollicitudin nisi. Cras purus urna, suscipit quis sapien eu, pulvinar tempor diam. Quisque risus orci, mollis id ante sit amet, gravida egestas nisl. Vestibulum sit amet erat at nulla eleifend gravida.

Nullam vel molestie justo. Curabitur vitae efficitur leo. In hac habitasse platea dictumst. Sed pulvinar mauris dui, eget varius purus congue ac. Suspendisse a tincidunt lacus. Curabitur at urna sagittis, dictum ante sit amet, euismod magna. Sed rutrum massa id tortor commodo, vitae elementum turpis tempus. Aliquam in turpis accumsan, malesuada nibh ut, hendrerit justo. Cum sociis natoque penatibus et magnis dis parturient montes, nascetur ridiculus mus. Quisque sed erat nec justo posuere suscipit. Donec ut efficitur arcu, in malesuada neque. Nunc dignissim nisl massa, id vulputate nunc pretium nec. Quisque eget urna in risus suscipit ultricies. Pellentesque odio odio, tincidunt in eleifend sed, posuere a diam. Nam gravida nisl convallis semper elementum. Morbi vitae felis faucibus, vulputate orci placerat, aliquet nisi. item.title: Example Page 2
item.description:
Here are some more tips for getting started with Academic:

Tip 3

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Duis posuere tellus ac convallis placerat. Proin tincidunt magna sed ex sollicitudin condimentum. Sed ac faucibus dolor, scelerisque sollicitudin nisi. Cras purus urna, suscipit quis sapien eu, pulvinar tempor diam. Quisque risus orci, mollis id ante sit amet, gravida egestas nisl. Sed ac tempus magna. Proin in dui enim. Donec condimentum, sem id dapibus fringilla, tellus enim condimentum arcu, nec volutpat est felis vel metus. Tip 4

Quisque imperdiet, nulla in pulvinar aliquet, velit quam ultrices quam, sit amet fringilla leo sem vel nunc. Mauris in lacinia lacus.

Suspendisse a tincidunt lacus. Curabitur at urna sagittis, dictum ante sit amet, euismod magna. Sed rutrum massa id tortor commodo, vitae elementum turpis tempus. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Aenean purus turpis, venenatis a ullamcorper nec, tincidunt et massa. Integer posuere quam rutrum arcu vehicula imperdiet. Duis condimentum lorem id eros commodo, in facilisis mauris scelerisque. Morbi sed auctor leo. Nullam volutpat a lacus quis pharetra. Nulla congue rutrum magna a ornare.

Aliquam in turpis accumsan, malesuada nibh ut, hendrerit justo. Cum sociis natoque penatibus et magnis dis parturient montes, nascetur ridiculus mus. Quisque sed erat nec justo posuere suscipit. Donec ut efficitur arcu, in malesuada neque. Nunc dignissim nisl massa, id vulputate nunc pretium nec. Quisque eget urna in risus suscipit ultricies. Pellentesque odio odio, tincidunt in eleifend sed, posuere a diam. Nam gravida nisl convallis semper elementum. Morbi vitae felis faucibus, vulputate orci placerat, aliquet nisi. Aliquam erat volutpat. Maecenas sagittis pulvinar purus, sed porta quam laoreet at.

✅ 复制成功

@article{meng2025channel, title={Channel-Reduced Transformer With Cross-Region Tokenization for Hyperspectral Image Classification}, author={Meng, Zhe and Zhang, Taizheng and Zhao, Feng and Hua, Wenqiang and Sun, Tian}, journal={IEEE Signal Processing Letters}, year={2025}, volume={32}, pages={3112--3116}, publisher={IEEE} }
Meng Z, Zhang T, Zhao F, et al. Channel-Reduced Transformer With Cross-Region Tokenization for Hyperspectral Image Classification[J]. IEEE Signal Processing Letters, 2025, 32: 3112-3116.
⬇ 下载标准 .bib 文件

✅ 复制成功

@article{meng2026joint, title={Joint Classification of Hyperspectral and LiDAR Data Based on Dynamic Sparse-Dense Transformer and Mamba}, author={Meng, Zhe and Yang, Zixin and Zhao, Feng}, journal={IEEE Journal of Selected Topics in Applied Earth Observations and Remote Sensing}, volume={19}, pages={11445--11461}, year={2026}, publisher={IEEE} }
Meng Z, Yang Z, Zhao F. Joint Classification of Hyperspectral and LiDAR Data Based on Dynamic Sparse-Dense Transformer and Mamba[J]. IEEE Journal of Selected Topics in Applied Earth Observations and Remote Sensing, 2026, 19: 11445-11461.
⬇ 下载标准 .bib 文件

✅ 复制成功

@article{meng2026spatial, title={Spatial-Frequency Joint Learning Mamba for Hyperspectral Image Classification}, author={Meng, Zhe and Yue, Lele and Zhao, Feng}, journal={IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Letters}, year={2026}, volume={23}, pages={1--5}, note = {{Art. no. 5501205}}, publisher={IEEE} }
Meng Z, Yue L, Zhao F. Spatial-Frequency Joint Learning Mamba for Hyperspectral Image Classification[J]. IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Letters, 2026, 23: 5501205.
⬇ 下载标准 .bib 文件

✅ 复制成功

@article{meng2026hyperspectral, title={Hyperspectral image classification via Manhattan self-attention transformer and adaptive global-local channel attention}, author={Meng, Zhe and Yue, Pan and Zhao, Feng}, journal={Journal of King Saud University Computer and Information Sciences}, year={2026}, volume={38}, number={97}, publisher={Springer} }
Meng Z, Yue P, Zhao F. Hyperspectral image classification via Manhattan self-attention transformer and adaptive global-local channel attention[J]. Journal of King Saud University Computer and Information Sciences, 2026, 38: 97.
⬇ 下载标准 .bib 文件

陈宋伟（2026级）

奖项
2024 山东省高等学校省级优秀学生

韩帅 （2025级）

项目课题
1 “卫星+”空间AI自然资源智能治理广西高校工程研究中心开放课题，基于深度动态网络的高光谱遥感影像农作物精细分类方法研究，2026.01-2027.12，参与
郝钟轩（2026级）

杨子鑫 （2024级）

奖项
2025 “华为杯”第二十二届中国研究生数学建模竞赛全国三等奖，3/3
2024 “华为杯”第二十一届中国研究生数学建模竞赛全国三等奖，3/3
2025 硕士研究生学业奖学金: 二等奖学金 (0.5万元)
2024 硕士研究生学业奖学金: 三等奖学金 (0.2万元)
学术成果
1 Zhe Meng, Zixin Yang, and Feng Zhao, Joint classification of hyperspectral and LiDAR data based on dynamic sparse-dense transformer and Mamba[J]. IEEE Journal of Selected Topics in Applied Earth Observations and Remote Sensing, 2026, 19: 11445-11461. (SCI二区)🔗
项目课题
1 陕西省教育厅科学研究计划，青年创新团队项目，24JP179，基于Mamba模型的高光谱遥感影像分类方法研究，2025.01-2026.12，在研，参与
2 “卫星+”空间AI自然资源智能治理广西高校工程研究中心开放课题，基于深度动态网络的高光谱遥感影像农作物精细分类方法研究，2026.01-2027.12，参与

闫芊 （2022级）

奖项
2024 硕士研究生学业奖学金: 一等奖学金 (1万元)
2022 硕士研究生学业奖学金: 一等奖学金 (1万元)
学术成果
1 Zhe Meng, Qian Yan, Feng Zhao, Gaige Chen, Wenqiang Hua, and Miaomiao Liang, Global-local multigranularity transformer for hyperspectral image classification[J]. IEEE Journal of Selected Topics in Applied Earth Observations and Remote Sensing, 2025, 18: 112-131. (二区)[Link]
2 Zhe Meng, Qian Yan, Feng Zhao, and Miaomiao Liang, Multi-scale feature attention and transformer for hyperspectral image classification[C]//Proceedings of the 2023 13th Workshop on Hyperspectral Imaging and Signal Processing: Evolution in Remote Sensing, Athens, Greece, 2023: 1-5. (EI)[Link]
3 Zhe Meng, Qian Yan, Feng Zhao, and Miaomiao Liang, Hyperspectral image classification with dynamic spatial-spectral attention network[C]//Proceedings of the 2023 13th Workshop on Hyperspectral Imaging and Signal Processing: Evolution in Remote Sensing, Athens, Greece, 2023: 1-4. (EI)[Link]
发明专利
1 孟哲，闫芊，岳攀，赵凤，益琛，陈改革，梁苗苗，基于动态卷积Transformer的高光谱图像分类方法及系统，中国，申请号：202311760963.7。
2 孟哲，张泰政，闫芊，赵凤，陈改革，梁苗苗，基于轻量级多尺度Transformer网络的高光谱图像分类方法及系统，中国，申请号：202311760700.6。
项目课题
1 陕西省教育厅科学研究计划，青年创新团队项目，24JP179，基于Mamba模型的高光谱遥感影像分类方法研究，2025.01-2026.12，在研，参与
2 陕西省自然科学基础研究计划，面上项目，2025JC-YBMS-759，基于视觉语言模型的高光谱遥感影像分类方法研究，2025.01-2026.12，在研，参与

岳乐乐 （2024级）

奖项
2025 “华为杯”第二十二届中国研究生数学建模竞赛全国三等奖，1/3
2025 硕士研究生学业奖学金: 三等奖学金 (0.2万元)
2024 硕士研究生学业奖学金: 三等奖学金 (0.2万元)
学术成果
1 Zhe Meng, Lele Yue, and Feng Zhao, Spatial-frequency joint learning mamba for hyperspectral image classification[J]. IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Letters, 2026, 23: 5501205. (SCI三区)
项目课题
1 西安邮电大学研究生创新基金，工科类一般项目，CXJJYL2024014，基于混合自注意力Mamba网络的高光谱图像分类方法研究，2024.11-2025.09，在研，主持
2 陕西省教育厅科学研究计划，青年创新团队项目，24JP179，基于Mamba模型的高光谱遥感影像分类方法研究，2025.01-2026.12，在研，参与
3 “卫星+”空间AI自然资源智能治理广西高校工程研究中心开放课题，基于深度动态网络的高光谱遥感影像农作物精细分类方法研究，2026.01-2027.12，在研，参与

岳攀 （2023级）

奖项
2023 硕士研究生学业奖学金: 三等奖学金 (0.2万元)
学术成果
1 Zhe Meng, Pan Yue, and Feng Zhao, Hyperspectral image classification via Manhattan self-attention transformer and adaptive global-local channel attention[J]. Journal of King Saud University Computer and Information Sciences, 2026, 38: 97. (SCI二区)
发明专利
1 孟哲，闫芊，岳攀，赵凤，益琛，陈改革，梁苗苗，基于动态卷积Transformer的高光谱图像分类方法及系统，中国，申请号：202311760963.7。
项目课题
1 西安邮电大学研究生创新基金，工科类一般项目，CXJJYL2024018，基于混合Transformer模型的高光谱图像分类方法研究，2024.11-2025.09，主持
2 陕西省教育厅科学研究计划，青年创新团队项目，24JP179，基于Mamba模型的高光谱遥感影像分类方法研究，2025.01-2026.12，在研，参与
3 陕西省自然科学基础研究计划，面上项目，2025JC-YBMS-759，基于视觉语言模型的高光谱遥感影像分类方法研究，2025.01-2026.12，在研，参与

张俊杰 （2020级）

奖项
2023 陕西省优秀硕士毕业生
2023 西安邮电大学优秀硕士毕业生
2023 西安邮电大学优秀硕士毕业论文
2023 陕西省第七届研究生创新成果展C档
2023 第三届中国图象图形学报研究生学术论坛优秀报告
2022 研究生国家奖学金 (2万元)
2021 研究生国家奖学金 (2万元)
2020 硕士研究生学业奖学金: 二等奖学金 (0.5万元)
学术成果
1 Feng Zhao, Junjie Zhang, Zhe Meng, Hanqiang Liu, Zhenhui Chang, and Jiulun Fan, Multiple vision architectures-based hybrid network for hyperspectral image classification[J]. Expert Systems with Applications, 2023, 234: 121032. (一区)[Link]
2 Zhe Meng, Junjie Zhang, Feng Zhao, Hanqiang Liu, and Zhenhui Chang, Residual dense asymmetric convolutional neural network for hyperspectral image classification[C]//Proceedings of the 2022 IEEE International Geoscience and Remote Sensing Symposium, Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, 2022: 3159-3162. (EI)[Link]
3 Feng Zhao, Junjie Zhang, Zhe Meng, and Hanqiang Liu, Densely connected pyramidal dilated convolutional network for hyperspectral image classification[J]. Remote Sensing, 2021, 13(17): 3396. (二区)[Link]

5 Feng Zhao, Shijie Li, Junjie Zhang, and Hanqiang Liu, Convolution transformer fusion splicing network for hyperspectral image classification[J]. IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Letters, 2023, 20: 5501005. (三区)[Link]

1 西安邮电大学研究生创新基金，理工类重大项目，CXJJBDL2023005，基于扩散模型的混合神经网络高光谱图像分类方法研究, 2023.10-2024.10，结题，主持
